templates.name: What is Route and Green Package Protection?
templates.content:
Route's Green Package Protection is a package protection solution that helps cover your order in the event that your order gets lost, stolen, or damaged while in transit while also protecting the planet. We know how frustrating it is to have something happen to your order, so we've partnered with Route to offer added assurance that you're supported, no matter what. Green Package Protection can be added during checkout.

Every time you add Green Package Protection to your order, Route donates to support an agroforestry initiative that removes CO2 from the air and promotes a flourishing ecosystem.

templates.name: I want to report a counterfeiter. Who should I contact?
templates.content: Thanks for letting us know. Please email brandenforcement@truereligion.com. Provide as many details as you can, including the name and address of the seller, how many jeans this person or entity is selling, and whether we may contact you for further information.

templates.name: Can I return my order if I redeemed rewards points for a discount?
templates.content: Yes. If you are returning the entire order, we will refund you the total dollar amount spent after the discount was applied. The points you used to redeem the discount will also be added back into your rewards account.

templates.name: What if the online seller says the True Religion Brand Jeans are New With Tags (NWT)? Does that mean that they are authentic?
templates.content: I'm afraid not. Counterfeiters have studied authentic True Religion Brand Jeans and are capable of copying the look of most of our labels and tags (although they are much lower quality). Almost all counterfeit jeans sold on eBay and other auction sites are advertised as New With Tags, but this means nothing because the tags often are counterfeit.

templates.name: What forms of payment can I use online?
templates.content: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, AfterPay, Klarna, and ApplePay.

templates.name: Do you offer exchanges online?
templates.content: I'm afraid we are unable to process exchanges online. For the best service and selection, please order your replacement items online or visit your local True Religion store.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.truereligion.com/size-charts.html

templates.name: How Does Route Work?
templates.content:
If your Route-protected order ends up lost, damaged, or stolen, Route's expert support team helps ensure that your order gets replaced or refunded as preferred. Claims will be reviewed for approval within 1-2 business days from filing.

If you need to file a claim, you can file here https://claims.route.com/

templates.name: Do I earn rewards for purchases done on the True Religion App?
templates.content: Currently at this time, you must create an account and opt-in to our loyalty program through our website. If you purchase through the app, you must make sure you are logged in to your account in order to receive rewards points for purchases. The full True Fam loyalty program dashboard is not yet available on the app, but we are working hard to get that done very soon. If you have any questions or need to receive points for purchases done in your app and you are a True Fam loyalty member, please contact cs@truereligion.com and we will be happy to assist you.

templates.name: Can I return my online purchase in store?
templates.content: Yes, you may also return your order to any US True Religion full price or outlet location, accompanied by your order confirmation and packing slip. If you don't have a receipt, you can exchange or receive a store credit for the current selling value of the item. Please note that a government issued photo ID is required for all in-store returns and exchanges.

templates.name: Are the products on the website the same as in the stores?
templates.content: Yes! Although our website may have a greater selection than a store in your area, the products are the same.

templates.name: Student discount
templates.content: You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.truereligion.com/studentbeans

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/truereligion/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/truereligion

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.truereligion.com/stores

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free ground shipping on domestic orders over $150. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.truereligion.com/orderstatus

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content:
The best way to handle this is to live chat with one of our agents from 9am-4pm Monday-Friday via SMS +1-855-928-6124 or the widget on our site. 

You can also email us directly at cs@truereligion.com. It usually takes 24hrs during the week and 24-48hrs during the weekend to get a response from the team.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our average processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS or UPS. Once shipped, it will take 8-10 business days for domestic orders. We also offer expedited shipping options.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.truereligion.com/returns

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I'm afraid we're unable to modify or cancel an order once it has been placed. My apologies for the inconvenience. However, if your order is eligible for returns - we make returns easy. Once you receive your order, please begin the return process here: https://www.truereligion.com/returns

templates.name: Sizing (clothes)
templates.content: We're happy to help you find the right size! Here are our size charts for your reference: https://www.truereligion.com/size-charts.html - If you're between sizes or need assistance selecting the proper size, please let us know.

templates.name: Do you ship to PO boxes or APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: For security reasons, we don't currently ship to P.O. boxes or APO/FPO addresses.

templates.name: How do affiliate programs work?
templates.content: We will provide links, images, and logos for True Religion for you to place on your website. All of these will link directly to our official site. We'll then pay you a percentage of all sales you refer to our site on a monthly basis.

templates.name: Someone is selling True Religion Brand Jeans jeans on eBay. Are they authentic?
templates.content: Please note that none of our authorized retailers are permitted to sell True Religion Brand Jeans jeans on eBay or other auction sites.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.truereligion.com/sale-view-all

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at cs@truereligion.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: How much will I an Affiliate Partner be paid?
templates.content: Our standard rate is 3% for coupon and deal sites and up to 8% for loyalty partners.

templates.name: Will I receive points for purchases I made prior to creating my loyalty account?
templates.content: You will only receive points for purchases made after creating your loyalty account. Make sure to create an account and sign up for loyalty membership before placing an order so you can receive points!

templates.name: What are the advantages of becoming a loyalty member?
templates.content:
Our loyalty program is a tiered program that allows members to earn more perks the more they engage with us. Members receive rewards points for each purchase, that can then be redeemed towards discounts on future purchases.

You also earn points for sharing with friends, following us on social media, leaving product reviews, and are even gifted with bonus points just for having a birthday! In addition to earning points, members have the chance to get early access to sales, exclusive deals, and more. You can view the full list of perks here: https://www.truereligion.com/true-fam-loyalty

templates.name: Do points ever expire?
templates.content: If you do not make a purchase or earn points for a period of 12 months, you will be considered a dormant user, and your points and rewards will return to zero. You will be moved down to Opening Act, the lowest tier.

templates.name: I signed up for the Birthday Bonus but I didn’t receive it?
templates.content:
In order for you to receive your birthday bonus on your birthday, you must register your birthday at least 30 days prior to your birthday. If your birthday falls between the day that you registered and the 30 day waiting period afterwards, you will receive your birthday bonus 30 days after your registration. This delay is only applicable for the first year that you signed up.

All successive birthday bonuses will be emailed to you on your birthday. If you register your birthday through your rewards account any time after it has passed in the current calendar year, rewards will not be added to your account until the day of your birthday in the following year.

If it has been more than 30 days since you registered for your birthday reward and you still have not received the additional points in your account, please contact cs@truereligion.com and we will be happy to assist you.

templates.name: Will I be able to use my points/rewards in store?
templates.content: You will able to earn points for in-store purchases if you have signed up online for our loyalty program and are utilizing the same email address on file or simply by uploading/scanning the barcode on your receipts and submitting. You must already be a loyalty member at or before the date posted on the receipt to receive the points. Unfortunately, at this time, you cannot apply rewards points toward purchases in-store. We are working to link our stores with our online site in the future.

templates.name: How do I redeem my points?
templates.content: Exchanging your points for rewards is easy! Simply log in and check your account details to view all your reward options available and click the 'Redeem' button to redeem your chosen reward. You can log in here: https://www.truereligion.com/account

templates.name: How do I sign up for the True Fam loyalty program?
templates.content: Signing up is easy! Create an account online here: https://www.truereligion.com/account and enter your name, email address and password. Don't forget to check the box to sign-up for membership. It's free to join and you will automatically be signed up to receive emails with insider access to sales, promotions, and all of our newest drops. If you currently have an account or email subscription with us - you will need to sign-in and go to your account page to opt-in to join our program.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You must first be partnered through Pepperjam Network before you can become a True Religion affiliate partner. It's free to join, and you can apply here: https://ascend.pepperjam.com/affiliate/registration.php?refid=85431

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check them out here - https://www.truereligion.com/true-fam-loyalty?lang=default https://www.truereligion.com/true-fam-loyalty?lang=default#loyalty-refer-friend

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.truereligion.com/sale-view-all?lang=default
